mapper.select:
select hr.id, coalesce(hr.sales_count, 0) as sales_count, hr.period, hr.status, hr.create_by, hr.create_time, hr.update_by, hr.update_time, hr.remark, p.id as product_id, p.product_name, p.price as product_price, p.image_url as product_image from cdc_product p left join cdc_hot_ranking hr on p.id = hr.product_id
p.del_flag = '0' and p.status = '0'
AND p.product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%')
AND hr.period = #{period}
order by sales_count desc

select hr.id, hr.product_id, hr.sales_count, hr.period, hr.status, hr.create_by, hr.create_time, hr.update_by, hr.update_time, hr.remark, p.product_name, p.price as product_price, p.image_url as product_image from cdc_hot_ranking hr left join cdc_product p on hr.product_id = p.id where hr.id = #{id}

select hr.id, hr.product_id, hr.sales_count, hr.period, hr.status, hr.create_by, hr.create_time, hr.update_by, hr.update_time, hr.remark, p.product_name, p.price as product_price, p.image_url as product_image from cdc_hot_ranking hr left join cdc_product p on hr.product_id = p.id where hr.period = #{period} and hr.status = '0' and p.status = '0' and p.del_flag = '0' order by hr.sales_count desc

select hr.id, hr.product_id, hr.sales_count, hr.period, hr.status, hr.create_by, hr.create_time, hr.update_by, hr.update_time, hr.remark, p.product_name, p.price as product_price, p.image_url as product_image from cdc_hot_ranking hr left join cdc_product p on hr.product_id = p.id where hr.product_id = #{productId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cdc_hot_ranking (product_id, sales_count, period, status, create_by, remark, create_time) values (#{productId}, #{salesCount}, #{period}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from cdc_hot_ranking where id in #{id}
